record.field: Acknowledgement of Sample Receipt – Report No {{ object.name }}

div.p: Thank you for giving us the opportunity to test your products.
We acknowledge the receipt of your sample. Please find below the details along with the expected test report delivery timeline:
Please find the attached sale order. To ensure timely delivery of the test report, we request you to arrange payment at your earliest convenience.

Any discrepancy in the sale order must be reported on the same working day of receipt of this email. Otherwise, the sale order and invoice will be deemed correct, testing will proceed accordingly, and your organization will be liable for the invoiced amount.
Also attached is a copy of our Terms & Conditions for your reference.
Please share the relevant Withholding Tax Certificates / CPRs at:

p.em: "Where tax is collected/deducted by a person other than the Federal/Provincial Government, it must be deposited in the Government Treasury or a designated bank within 7 days from the end of the week (ending every Sunday)."

div.p: Note: CPRs must be submitted within 30 days of deduction. Failure to do so will result in the amount being adjusted against your next invoice.

Disclaimer:
Final testing charges on the Invoice may vary from this sale order based on actual testing performed, any changes in the test requisition, or addition/removal of tests.
Thank you for choosing Textile Testing International.

Best regards,
Customer Services
Textile Testing International
ISO 17025 Accredited Lab
347-S, Quaid-e-Azam Industrial Estate
Kot Lakhpat, Lahore -- 54500, Pakistan
Tel: (92-42) 111-786-001 | Fax: (92-42) 3515-4555
📧 customerservices@ttilabs.net | 🌐 www.ttilabs.net

p.em: Note: This is a system-generated message and does not require a signature.

ol.li: Textile Testing International will conduct tests in accordance with and subject to the terms and the conditions herein contained. The conditions may only be modified by a variation expressed in writing and signed on behalf of the company by a Director and no other action on the part of Textile Testing International or its employees or agents shall be construed as an acceptance of any other terms and conditions.

It shall be the responsibility of the client to ascertain and notify Textile Testing International of the standards with which any sample submitted for testing must comply in any country or territory in which the sample concerned is intended to be sold. In default of specific instructions Textile Testing International will adopt the test methods and standards considered most appropriate. When the test method proposed by the customer is considered to be inappropriate or out of date, the customer is communicated accordingly for approval.

The client will ensure that clear instructions are provided to Textile Testing International in due time to enable the required services to be performed effectively. Any deviation required by the customer shall not affect the validity of results and acceptable to customer and Tit.
In case of any deviation from the contract, Tti will inform the customer through proper mean.

Textile Testing International with subject to the clients requirements test any sample submitted to it or sampled by Textile Testing International from bulk to ascertain its conformity or otherwise with contract description or sample. In no circumstances wil t Textile Testing International render any opinion as to the fitness of any sample from the purpose for which it is said to be intended unless in any specific case Textile Testing International is requested so to do and agrees so to do in writing.

A Test Report issued by Textile Testing International shall refer only to the sample actually tested and shall not refer or be deemed to refer to bulk from which such a sample may be said to have been obtained.

Tti will ensure confidentiality of information obtained in the laboratory ac tivities and the proprietary rights of clients are protected. Test reports issued by Textile Testing International are subject to the condition that they are not to be made public or used in c onnection with or for the purpose of any advertising promotional or publicity undertaking or material whatsoever without the express consent in writing of hereto first obtained.
In situations where Tti is required by law or competent authority to release confidential information, the client is notified , unless prohibited by law, of the information provided.

In the event that any Test Report issued by the Textile Testing International is required for use in connection with or for e vidence in any Court or Arbitration proceedings, Tti Testing Laboratories will render all assistance and explanation reasonably required in connection wherewith all costs and expenses incurred by Textile Testing International in giving such assistance or explanatio ns shall be borne by the client to whose order the Test Report in question was prepared.

Tti observes confidentiality of information about the client obtained indirectly, such as complainant or regulators and the i nformation provider (source) identity shall also be kept confidential unless agreed.

In no circumstance will the issuing of any Test Report by Textile Testing International operate or be deemed or purport to involve Textile Testing International as a party or agent in any other way in any relationship contractual or otherwise between the c lient for whom the Test Report shall have been prepared and any other party whom so ever.

In the event that any test report shall be proven inaccurate and that inaccuracy thereof shall have been caused by the act or default of Textile Testing International or its technicians or agents then and in any such case the liability of Textile Testing International shall be limited to retesting or refunding to client of whom the Test Report shalt have made free of interest the fee paid to Textile Testing International.

In the process of testing Textile Testing International may use any alternate method or input which had been tested through internal testing to have the same effect. Due to unavailability or unavoidable circumstances.

Samples received at Textile Testing International without sufficient information to proceed with testing and samples for which the client does not give a clear consent to bear the cost of the required or requested testing, will be held and stored for a max imum of 30 days after which they would be disposed.

The Textile Testing International shall be entitled at its discretion to delegate the performance of the whole or any part of the services contracted for with the principal to any agent or subcontractor.

Every Officer, employee, agent or subcontractor of Textile Testing International shall have the benefit of the limitation of liability and the indemnities contained in the general conditions. So far as relates to such limitation and indemnities, any contract enter ed into by the Textile Testing International is entered into not only its own behalf but also as agent and trusty for every such person as aforesaid.

If the requirements of the client necessitate the analysis of sample by the principal or by any 3rd party, Textile Testing In ternational will pass on the result of the analysis but without responsibility for its accuracy. Where the Textile Testing International is on ly able to witness an analysis by the principal or be any 3rd party the Textile Testing International will provide confirmation, if such be the case that a correct sample has been analysed but will not otherwise be responsible for the accuracy of such analysis.
Tti reserves the right to file a suite in the court of law to recover the due amount in the case of non -payment in 65 days.

Samples for testing will be disposed off at the discretion of Textile Testing International after expiry of 30 days or mentio ned otherwise, from the date of test report, unless a written request and pick up arrangements are made by client for their return.
Payment Terms: Test charges need to be paid in advance.

On the request of Client, Textile Testing International may forward Samples/Test Reports to the Clients or to the buyer or agent of the Client and all costs involved in such a request to be borne by the Client.
This report shall not be reproduced except in full without prior authorization from Textile Testing International.

Statement of conformity and measurement uncertainty will only be provided where required and agreed by the client. On the basis of provided specification, standard with the application of clearly defined decision rule.

div.p: 347-S, Quaid-e-Azam Industrial Estate, Kot Lakhpat, Lahore- 54770 Pakistan.

p.strong: ISO/IEC 17025 Accredited Lab | ICPSC Accredited Lab | ISO/IEC 17020 Accredited Inspection Agency | EPA Certified Lab
